The '''Yarlubb river''' was on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], flowing somewhere between [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] and [[Red Bush Grove]]. [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar]] once followed this river during his search for another village after his own was destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
Yarlubb river was a location developed by [[Arthur Papadam]] as part of [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar's]] ''[[What's The Story?]]'' entry.
